description.en_US: Work with DingTalk users, approvals, and robots.
description.zh_Hans: 操作钉钉用户、审批和机器人。

description.en_US: Enterprise internal app credential for DingTalk Open Platform APIs.
description.zh_Hans: 用于调用钉钉开放平台企业内部应用 API 的凭证。

hint.en_US: Organization ID where the DingTalk app is installed.
hint.zh_Hans: 钉钉应用所属组织的 Corp ID。

hint.en_US: Found in the DingTalk developer console under app credentials.
hint.zh_Hans: 可在钉钉开发者后台的应用凭证中找到。

hint.en_US: Keep this secret secure. It is used to fetch access tokens at runtime.
hint.zh_Hans: 请妥善保管。运行时会用它来获取 access token。

hint.en_US: Optional default operator unionId for document and workflow operations. When a workflow tool needs a userId and none is provided, the plugin resolves it from this unionId.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。用于文档和审批等操作的默认操作人 unionId。当审批工具需要 userId 且未直接填写时，插件会用这个 unionId 自动解析。

hint.en_US: Required. Use the AgentId of your internal DingTalk app. See DingTalk Basic Concepts and find it in the developer console for the app.
hint.zh_Hans: 必填。填写钉钉企业内部应用的 AgentId。可参考钉钉开放平台《基础概念》文档，并在该应用的开发者后台中查看。

tools.name: dingtalk-auth-get-access-token

description.en_US: Fetch the current DingTalk app access token using the selected credential.
description.zh_Hans: 使用所选凭证获取当前钉钉应用的 access token。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / get-app-access-token

Fetch the current DingTalk app access token using the selected credential.

## Input Parameters

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `credential_id` | `credential_id` | yes | — | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`. |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app"
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`
- Fields:

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `corp_id` | `string` | yes | Organization ID where the DingTalk app is installed. |
| `client_id` | `string` | yes | DingTalk app Client ID. |
| `client_secret` | `encrypted_string` | yes | DingTalk app Client Secret. |
| `user_union_id` | `string` | no | Default operator unionId for workflow-related operations. |
| `agent_id` | `string` | yes | AgentId of the internal DingTalk app. |

## Success Output

```json
{
  "corpId": "dingxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "clientId": "dingoaxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "accessToken": "abc123def456"
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-robot-batch-send

description.en_US: Send one-to-one robot messages in batch.
description.zh_Hans: 批量发送人与机器人单聊消息。

llm_description.en_US: DingTalk robot code used to send the batch robot message.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用于发送批量机器人消息的钉钉机器人编码。

llm_description.en_US: DingTalk user IDs to send the batch robot message to. Up to 20 userIds per request.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要发送批量机器人消息的钉钉用户 userId 列表。每次请求最多 20 个 userId。

hint.en_US: Up to 20 userIds per request.
hint.zh_Hans: 每次请求最多 20 个 userId。

llm_description.en_US: Structured robot message payload. Choose one message type and provide the fields for that type.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 结构化的机器人消息对象。选择一种消息类型，并填写该类型所需字段。

llm_description.en_US: Robot message type. Supported values are text, link, markdown, actionCard, and feedCard.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 机器人消息类型。支持 text、link、markdown、actionCard 和 feedCard。

hint.en_US: Choose the message type and fill the fields for that type only.
hint.zh_Hans: 选择消息类型后，只填写该类型对应的字段。

llm_description.en_US: Content for a text robot message.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 文本机器人消息的内容。

llm_description.en_US: Title shown for link, markdown, or action card messages.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 链接、Markdown 或 Action Card 消息显示的标题。

llm_description.en_US: Text field whose meaning depends on the message type: for link, use the short body/preview text; for markdown, use the Markdown body; for actionCard, use the card body text, which also supports Markdown.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 文本字段的含义取决于消息类型：link 使用摘要/正文文本，markdown 使用 Markdown 正文，actionCard 使用卡片正文文本，且 markdown 与 actionCard 的文本都支持 Markdown。

hint.en_US: For link messages, this is the preview/body text. For markdown messages, enter Markdown content. For action card messages, enter the card body and DingTalk supports Markdown there too.
hint.zh_Hans: 当类型为链接消息时，这里填写摘要/正文文本；当类型为 Markdown 消息时，这里填写 Markdown 正文；当类型为 Action Card 时，这里填写卡片正文，且同样支持 Markdown。

llm_description.en_US: URL opened when the user clicks the message or feed card item.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用户点击消息或 FeedCard 条目后打开的 URL。

hint.en_US: Usually an https URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 通常填写 https URL。

llm_description.en_US: Optional image URL or mediaId for link messages, and the image URL for feed card items.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 链接消息可选的图片 URL 或 mediaId，以及 FeedCard 条目的图片 URL。

hint.en_US: For link messages, DingTalk accepts an image URL or a mediaId. Feed cards usually use an image URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 链接消息可填写图片 URL 或 mediaId；FeedCard 通常填写图片 URL。

llm_description.en_US: Action card layout variant: single button, vertical 2-5 buttons, or horizontal 2 buttons.
llm_description.zh_Hans: Action Card 的布局变体：单按钮、竖向 2-5 个按钮，或横向 2 个按钮。

hint.en_US: Single button, vertical 2-5 buttons, or horizontal 2 buttons.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选单按钮、竖向 2-5 个按钮或横向 2 个按钮。

llm_description.en_US: Button title used when the action card has a single button.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 当 Action Card 使用单按钮时展示的按钮标题。

llm_description.en_US: URL opened when the single action card button is clicked.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 点击单按钮 Action Card 时打开的 URL。

hint.en_US: Usually an https URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 通常填写 https URL。

llm_description.en_US: Buttons for action card variants that use multiple buttons. Each item needs a title and action_url.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 多按钮 Action Card 使用的按钮列表。每个按钮都需要 title 和 action_url。

hint.en_US: Use 2-5 buttons for vertical buttons, or exactly 2 for horizontal buttons.
hint.zh_Hans: 竖向按钮支持 2-5 个，横向按钮固定 2 个。

llm_description.en_US: Title shown for an action card button.
llm_description.zh_Hans: Action Card 按钮显示的标题。

llm_description.en_US: URL opened when an action card button is clicked.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 点击 Action Card 按钮后打开的 URL。

hint.en_US: Usually an https URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 通常填写 https URL。

llm_description.en_US: Feed card items. Provide at least one item with title, message_url, and pic_url.
llm_description.zh_Hans: FeedCard 条目列表。至少提供一个包含 title、message_url 和 pic_url 的条目。

hint.en_US: Add one or more feed card items.
hint.zh_Hans: 至少添加一个 FeedCard 条目。

llm_description.en_US: Title shown for link, markdown, or action card messages.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 链接、Markdown 或 Action Card 消息显示的标题。

llm_description.en_US: URL opened when the user clicks the message or feed card item.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用户点击消息或 FeedCard 条目后打开的 URL。

hint.en_US: Usually an https URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 通常填写 https URL。

llm_description.en_US: Optional image URL or mediaId for link messages, and the image URL for feed card items.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 链接消息可选的图片 URL 或 mediaId，以及 FeedCard 条目的图片 URL。

hint.en_US: For link messages, DingTalk accepts an image URL or a mediaId. Feed cards usually use an image URL.
hint.zh_Hans: 链接消息可填写图片 URL 或 mediaId；FeedCard 通常填写图片 URL。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / batch-send-robot-message

Send one-to-one robot messages to multiple DingTalk users in batch.

## Input Parameters

| Field           | Type                | Required | Default | Description                         |
| --------------- | ------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `credential_id` | `credential_id`     | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`. |
| `robot_code`    | `string`            | yes      | —       | DingTalk robot code.                |
| `user_ids`      | `array` of `string` | yes      | —       | Target user IDs. Min 1, max 20.     |
| `message`       | `object`            | yes      | —       | Structured robot message payload.   |

### Message Object
The `message` object must include a `type` and the fields required for that type:

- `type`: `"text"` | `"link"` | `"markdown"` | `"actionCard"` | `"feedCard"`
- **text**: requires `content`
- **link**: requires `title`, `text`, `message_url`; optional `pic_url`
- **markdown**: requires `title`, `text`
- **actionCard**: requires `title`, `text`, `action_card_variant`
  - `single`: requires `single_title`, `single_url`
  - `vertical_buttons`: requires `buttons` (2–5 items)
  - `horizontal_buttons`: requires `buttons` (exactly 2 items)
- **feedCard**: requires `links` (at least 1 item with `title`, `message_url`, `pic_url`)

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "robot_code": "robot123",
  "user_ids": ["user1", "user2"],
  "message": {
    "type": "text",
    "content": "Hello from Atomemo!"
  }
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "processQueryKey": "abc123",
  "invalidStaffIdList": [],
  "flowControlledStaffIdList": []
}
```

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / send-group-robot-message

Send a robot message to a DingTalk group chat.

## Input Parameters

| Field                  | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                    |
| ---------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id`        | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.            |
| `robot_code`           | `string`        | yes      | —       | DingTalk robot code.                           |
| `open_conversation_id` | `string`        | yes      | —       | Open conversation ID of the target group chat. |
| `message`              | `object`        | yes      | —       | Structured robot message payload.              |

### Message Object
Same schema as `batch-send-robot-message`.

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "robot_code": "robot123",
  "open_conversation_id": "cidxxxxxxxxxx",
  "message": {
    "type": "markdown",
    "title": "Weekly Report",
    "text": "## Summary\\nAll systems operational."
  }
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "processQueryKey": "abc123"
}
```

| `user_id`       | `string`        | yes      | —       | DingTalk user ID to retrieve.       |

### Example Input

```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",

}
```

## Credential

tools.name: dingtalk-user-search

description.en_US: Search users by name, pinyin, or English name.
description.zh_Hans: 按姓名、拼音或英文名搜索用户。

llm_description.en_US: Keyword to search DingTalk users by name, pinyin, or English name.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 按姓名、拼音或英文名搜索钉钉用户时使用的关键词。

hint.zh_Hans: 用户名称、名称拼音或英文名称。

llm_description.zh_Hans: 用户搜索的分页偏移量，从 0 开始。

llm_description.en_US: Number of users to return in this search request.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 本次搜索请求要返回的用户数量。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / search-users

Search DingTalk users by name, pinyin, or English name.

## Input Parameters

| Field              | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                            |
| ------------------ | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------ |
| `credential_id`    | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                    |
| `query_word`       | `string`        | yes      | —       | Keyword to search by name, pinyin, or English name.    |
| `offset`           | `integer`       | no       | `0`     | Pagination offset starting from 0.                     |
| `size`             | `integer`       | no       | `10`    | Number of users to return (1–100).                     |
| `full_match_field` | `boolean`       | no       | `false` | Whether to require an exact match on supported fields. |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "query_word": "Zhang San",
  "offset": 0,
  "size": 10,
  "full_match_field": false
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "hasMore": false,
  "totalCount": 1,
  "list": ["user123"]
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-get-process-instance

description.en_US: Get details for a workflow process instance.
description.zh_Hans: 获取单个审批实例详情。

llm_description.en_US: Workflow process instance ID to retrieve.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要获取详情的流程审批实例 ID。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / get-process-instance

Get details for a workflow process instance.

## Input Parameters

| Field                 | Type            | Required | Default | Description                               |
| --------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id`       | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.       |
| `process_instance_id` | `string`        | yes      | —       | Workflow process instance ID to retrieve. |

### Example Input
```json
{
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-add-process-comment

description.en_US: Add a comment to a process instance.

llm_description.en_US: Workflow process instance ID to comment on.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要添加评论的流程审批实例 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Optional text body of the workflow comment.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 审批评论的文本内容，可选。

llm_description.en_US: Optional commenter userId in DingTalk. If omitted, the plugin resolves it from the credential's default user_union_id.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 评论人在钉钉中的 userId，可选。留空时插件会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 自动解析。

hint.en_US: Optional. Leave blank to resolve commentUserId from the credential's default user_union_id.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。留空时会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 解析出 commentUserId。

llm_description.en_US: Optional image file to include in the workflow comment. Provide a file_ref; the plugin will send it as file.photos after resolving a remote URL.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 审批评论里附带的图片文件，可选。传入 file_ref 后，插件会解析远程 URL 并按 file.photos 发送。

hint.en_US: Optional. Select an image file to attach to the workflow comment.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。选择要附在审批评论里的图片文件。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / add-process-comment

Add a comment to a workflow process instance.

## Input Parameters

| Field                 | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                               |
| --------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id`       | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                       |
| `process_instance_id` | `string`        | yes      | —       | Workflow process instance ID to comment on.               |
| `text`                | `string`        | no       | —       | Comment text body.                                        |
| `comment_user_id`     | `string`        | no       | —       | Commenter userId. Defaults to credential `user_union_id`. |
| `file`                | `file_ref`      | no       | —       | Optional image file to attach. Must be an image.          |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "process_instance_id": "instance123",
  "text": "Approved, please proceed.",
  "comment_user_id": "user123"
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "result": true,
  "success": true
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-execute-process-task

description.en_US: Approve or reject a single workflow task. DingTalk documents this capability for internal apps and requires task execution in approval-node order.
description.zh_Hans: 对单个审批任务执行同意或拒绝。钉钉文档说明该能力面向内部应用，且任务需按审批节点顺序处理。

llm_description.en_US: Workflow process instance ID that owns the task to execute.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要处理的审批任务所属流程审批实例 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Task node ID of the workflow task to approve or reject.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要同意或拒绝的审批任务节点 ID。

llm_description.en_US: Optional DingTalk user ID of the actor executing the workflow task. This maps to actionerUserId in the API. If omitted, the plugin resolves it from the credential's default user_union_id.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 执行审批任务的钉钉用户 userId，对应接口中的 actionerUserId，可选。留空时插件会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 自动解析。

hint.en_US: Optional. Leave blank to resolve actionerUserId from the credential's default user_union_id.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。留空时会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 解析出 actionerUserId。

llm_description.en_US: Execution result for the workflow task: use agree to approve or refuse to reject.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 审批任务的处理结果：agree 表示同意，refuse 表示拒绝。

hint.en_US: Use agree to approve the current task or refuse to reject it. DingTalk requires tasks to be executed in approval-node order.
hint.zh_Hans: agree 表示同意，refuse 表示拒绝。钉钉要求按审批节点顺序处理任务。

llm_description.en_US: Optional remark to include with the approval or rejection.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 审批同意或拒绝时附带的备注文本，可选。

hint.en_US: Optional. Useful for approval comments or rejection reasons. DingTalk documents this task-execution API for internal apps.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。可填写审批意见或拒绝原因。钉钉文档说明该任务处理接口面向内部应用。

llm_description.en_US: Optional image file to include while executing the workflow task. Provide a file_ref; the plugin will send it as file.photos after resolving a remote URL.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 处理审批任务时附带的图片文件，可选。传入 file_ref 后，插件会解析远程 URL 并按 file.photos 发送。

hint.en_US: Optional. Select an image file to send with the task execution.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。选择要随审批任务处理一并发送的图片文件。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / execute-process-task

Approve or reject a single workflow task.

## Input Parameters

| Field                 | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                           |
| --------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id`       | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                   |
| `process_instance_id` | `string`        | yes      | —       | Process instance that owns the task.                  |
| `task_id`             | `integer`       | yes      | —       | Task node ID to execute.                              |
| `actioner_user_id`    | `string`        | no       | —       | Actor userId. Defaults to credential `user_union_id`. |
| `result`              | `string`        | yes      | —       | `agree` or `refuse`.                                  |
| `remark`              | `string`        | no       | —       | Optional remark for the action.                       |
| `file`                | `file_ref`      | no       | —       | Optional image attachment. Must be an image.          |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "process_instance_id": "instance123",
  "task_id": 1,
  "actioner_user_id": "user123",
  "result": "agree",
  "remark": "Looks good"
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "result": true,
  "success": true
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-download-process-attachment

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取审批附件下载信息

description.en_US: Get download authorization information for a process attachment.
description.zh_Hans: 获取审批附件下载授权信息。

llm_description.en_US: Workflow process instance ID that owns the attachment.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 包含该附件的流程审批实例 ID。

llm_description.en_US: The fileId uploaded in a workflow form component. Comment attachment fileIds are not supported for download links yet.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 审批组件中上传的 fileId。评论中上传的附件 fileId 暂不支持获取下载链接。

hint.en_US: Use the fileId from a workflow form component. Comment attachment fileIds are not supported for download links yet.
hint.zh_Hans: 请填写审批表单组件中上传的 fileId。评论附件中的 fileId 暂不支持获取下载链接。

llm_description.en_US: Whether the file_id refers to a comment attachment instead of a form attachment.
llm_description.zh_Hans: file_id 是否指向评论附件而不是表单附件。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / download-process-attachment

Get download authorization information for a process attachment.

## Input Parameters

| Field                     | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                         |
| ------------------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id`           | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                 |
| `process_instance_id`     | `string`        | yes      | —       | Process instance that owns the attachment.          |
| `file_id`                 | `string`        | yes      | —       | File ID from the workflow form component.           |
| `with_comment_attachment` | `boolean`       | no       | `false` | Whether the file_id refers to a comment attachment. |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "process_instance_id": "instance123",
  "file_id": "file456",
  "with_comment_attachment": false
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "result": {
    "downloadUri": "https://example.com/download/file.pdf",
    "fileId": "26748422566",
    "spaceId": 3996960664
  }
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-list-process-instance-ids

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取审批实例 ID 列表

description.en_US: List workflow process instance IDs by process code and filters.
description.zh_Hans: 按审批流编码和筛选条件获取审批实例 ID 列表。

llm_description.en_US: Workflow process code whose instance IDs should be listed.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 要列出实例 ID 的审批流编码。

llm_description.en_US: Required start time for filtering process instances. Supports Unix millisecond timestamps and absolute EN/ZH date-time formats such as 2026-04-15, 2026-04-15 14:30, 2026/04/15 14:30:00, 2026-04-15T14:30:00+08:00, April 15, 2026 2:30 PM, and 2026年4月15日 14:30. Date-only values resolve to the start of that day in the runtime local timezone.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 筛选审批实例的开始时间，必填。支持 Unix 毫秒时间戳，以及多种中英文绝对日期时间格式，例如 2026-04-15、2026-04-15 14:30、2026/04/15 14:30:00、2026-04-15T14:30:00+08:00、April 15, 2026 2:30 PM、2026年4月15日 14:30。仅填写日期时会按运行时本地时区的当天开始时间解析。

hint.en_US: Required. Supports Unix ms timestamps and absolute date/time formats such as 2026-04-15, 2026-04-15 14:30, 2026/04/15 14:30:00, 2026-04-15T14:30:00+08:00, April 15, 2026 2:30 PM, and 2026年4月15日 14:30. Date-only values use the start of that day.

llm_description.en_US: Optional end time for filtering process instances. Supports the same absolute EN/ZH date-time formats as start_time. Date-only values resolve to the end of that day in the runtime local timezone. Reject ambiguous numeric dates like 04/05/2026.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 筛选审批实例的结束时间，可选。支持与 start_time 相同的中英文绝对日期时间格式。仅填写日期时会按运行时本地时区的当天结束时间解析；像 04/05/2026 这类有歧义的纯数字日期会被拒绝。

hint.en_US: Optional. Supports the same absolute formats as Start Time. Date-only values use the end of that day.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。支持与开始时间相同的绝对日期时间格式。仅填写日期时会按当天结束时间处理。

llm_description.en_US: Optional list of DingTalk user IDs who started the process instances. Filters results to only instances started by these users.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 可选的审批实例发起人钉钉用户 userId 列表。用于筛选仅由这些用户发起的审批实例。

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of process instance IDs to return per page.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页返回的审批实例 ID 数量上限。

llm_description.en_US: Pagination token for the next page of process instance IDs.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 获取下一页审批实例 ID 时使用的分页游标。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / list-process-instance-ids

List workflow process instance IDs by process code and filters.

## Input Parameters

| Field           | Type                | Required | Default | Description                                                                     |
| --------------- | ------------------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id` | `credential_id`     | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                                             |
| `process_code`  | `string`            | yes      | —       | Workflow process code.                                                          |
| `start_time`    | `string` / `number` | yes      | —       | Start time filter (Unix ms or absolute date).                                   |
| `end_time`      | `string` / `number` | no       | —       | End time filter (same format as start_time).                                    |
| `user_ids`      | `array` of `string` | no       | —       | Optional starter user IDs filter.                                               |
| `statuses`      | `array` of `string` | no       | —       | Optional status filters: RUNNING, TERMINATED, COMPLETED, COMPLETED_WITH_BLANKS. |
| `max_results`   | `integer`           | no       | `20`    | Page size (1–100).                                                              |
| `next_token`    | `integer`           | no       | `0`     | Pagination token.                                                               |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "process_code": "PROC-123",
  "start_time": "2026-04-01",
  "end_time": "2026-04-15",
  "statuses": ["COMPLETED"],
  "max_results": 20,
  "next_token": 0
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "result": {
    "list": ["instance1", "instance2"],
    "nextToken": "20"
  },
  "success": true
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-get-process-space-info

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取审批钉盘空间信息

description.en_US: Get DingDrive space information used for workflow attachments.
description.zh_Hans: 获取审批附件上传所需的钉盘空间信息。

llm_description.en_US: Optional DingTalk user ID used to query workflow attachment space info. If omitted, the plugin resolves it from the credential's default user_union_id.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 用于查询审批附件空间信息的钉钉用户 userId，可选。留空时插件会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 自动解析。

hint.en_US: Optional. Leave blank to resolve userId from the credential's default user_union_id.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。留空时会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 解析出 userId。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / get-process-space-info

Get DingDrive space information used for workflow attachments.

## Input Parameters

| Field           | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                               |
| --------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id` | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                       |
| `user_id`       | `string`        | no       | —       | DingTalk user ID. Defaults to credential `user_union_id`. |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "user_id": "user123"
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`
- Requires `agent_id` to be set on the credential.

## Success Output

```json
{
  "result": {
    "spaceId": 3996960664
  },
  "success": true
}
```

tools.name: dingtalk-workflow-list-user-visible-templates

display_name.zh_Hans: 获取用户可见审批模板

description.en_US: List workflow templates visible to a user.

hint.en_US: Optional. Leave blank to resolve userId from the credential's default user_union_id.
hint.zh_Hans: 可选。留空时会通过凭证里的默认 user_union_id 解析出 userId。

llm_description.en_US: Maximum number of templates to return per page.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 每页返回的模板数量上限。

llm_description.en_US: Pagination token for the next page of visible templates.
llm_description.zh_Hans: 获取下一页可见模板时使用的分页游标。

tools.skill:
# dingtalk / list-visible-process-templates

List workflow templates visible to a DingTalk user.

## Input Parameters

| Field           | Type            | Required | Default | Description                                               |
| --------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------- |
| `credential_id` | `credential_id` | yes      | —       | Links to credential `dingtalk-app`.                       |
| `user_id`       | `string`        | no       | —       | DingTalk user ID. Defaults to credential `user_union_id`. |
| `max_results`   | `integer`       | no       | `100`   | Page size (1–100).                                        |
| `next_token`    | `integer`       | no       | `0`     | Pagination token.                                         |

### Example Input
```json
{
  "credential_id": "my-dingtalk-app",
  "user_id": "user123",
  "max_results": 100,
  "next_token": 0
}
```

## Credential

- Credential name: `dingtalk-app`

## Success Output

```json
{
  "result": {
    "processList": [
      {
        "iconUrl": "https://img.alicdn.com/imgextra/i4/O1CN01YAC0Pa1LM7OrwrIdZ_!!6000000001284-0-tps-480-480.jpg",

      }
    ]
  }
}
```
